key_finding: METHODOLOGICAL NULL: gold-pred R=0.929 (near-miss errors) makes V_R(gold) ≈ V_R(pred) uninformative. Experiment underpowered to distinguish computation-faithful vs general-features interpretations. All Δ < 0.012, all p > 0.3.
evidence_impact: New entry #118. Accuracy-conditional finding ambiguity identified but unresolved. Methodological insight: need qualitatively large errors or classification probes to test this question.
next_planned: Classification probe (correct/incorrect from V-cache), or intermediate value probing, or Mistral functional conditioning replication.
